claim_boundary: Exact-source and local-feasibility input only; no authentication, authorization, interoperability, certification, or release evidence.

files.reviewed_conclusion: Unstable SourceInfo contains a Zenoh EntityGlobalId and sequence number; Sample has no certificate-principal field.

required_fragments: Sets an optional [`SourceInfo`](crate::sample::SourceInfo) to be sent along with the publication.
files.reviewed_conclusion: The sending sample builder can choose the SourceInfo carried with a publication.

required_fragments: Sets an optional [`SourceInfo`](crate::sample::SourceInfo) to be sent along with the request/query.
files.reviewed_conclusion: The query sender can choose the SourceInfo carried with a request.
The query responder can choose sample SourceInfo for a reply.
Queryable callbacks expose request content and optional sender-supplied SourceInfo, not a verified certificate principal.

required_fragments: Gets the ID of the zenoh instance that answered this reply.
files.reviewed_conclusion: Reply may expose a Zenoh replier entity ID; this is not documented as a verified certificate principal.
Liveliness construction supplies no source or replier information.
SessionInfo exposes connected Zenoh IDs, not per-delivery certificate attribution.

required_fragments: type To = Box<dyn Iterator<Item = ZenohId> + Send + Sync>
files.reviewed_conclusion: The peer-info builder enumerates Zenoh IDs at session scope.
Upstream tests intentionally set and observe sender-selected source IDs and sequence numbers.
Upstream live tests cover subscriber and query liveliness paths whose construction is source-less in session.rs.
